title: Rhenium
description: Optimization for minecraft that culls block entities, entities, particles and items.
body:
# Rhenium

Rhenium is a Fabric performance optimization mod designed to reduce lag in large survival worlds, particularly those with complex redstone contraptions and automated storage systems.

### What it optimizes:

- Hopper throttling — Idle hoppers that have nothing to move are throttled, significantly reducing tick overhead in large storage systems with many hoppers
- Item entity throttling — Stationary ground items tick less frequently, reducing lag in areas with large item piles
- Chest render culling — Chest block entity renderers are skipped beyond 24 blocks, reducing client FPS drops in storage rooms with many chests
- Particle culling - Changes the distance at which the particles are rendered
- Entity culling - Changes the distance in which the entities are rendered

Fully configurable — Every optimization can be toggled individually via Mod Menu, so you keep only what you need.

## Requirements:

- Fabric Loader 0.16.10+
- Minecraft 1.21.1 – 1.21.11
- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config

## Recomended mods:

- Sodium
- Lithium
- Entity culling

## Questions
If you have any questions not explained in the description, feel free to join my discord server!
[![ItzTidez discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de7f2f606702569cd98fc1f6a0b29dbf817dd870.png)](https://discord.gg/7G9nWxrss5)
